mapper.select: /* RequestMapper.getRequestList */ SELECT A.BATCH_JOB_ID AS batchJobId ,A.BATCH_REQ_ID AS batchReqId ,A.REQ_DTTM AS reqDttm ,A.EXEC_PARAM AS execParam ,B.EXEC_SERVICE AS execService ,A.EXEC_TYPE_CD AS execTypeCd FROM CMN_BATCH_REQUEST A ,CMN_BATCH_INFO B WHERE A.BATCH_JOB_ID = B.BATCH_JOB_ID AND A.EXEC_YN = 'N' AND B.SERVER_TYPE = '01'
